---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about the patrol system
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: question
assignees: ''
---

## Question

What would you like to know?

## Context

What are you trying to accomplish? What have you already tried?

## System Information (if relevant)

- **Device Model**: (e.g., UDM, UDR, UNVR)
- **PTZ Camera Model**: (e.g., G5 PTZ, G6 PTZ)
- **UniFi Protect Version**: (e.g., v6.2.88)

## What I've Already Checked

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] Existing GitHub issues
- [ ] Service logs (`journalctl -u ptz-patrol.service`)
- [ ] Discovery output (`bash /data/ptz-patrol/discover.sh`)

## Additional Information

Any other details that might help answer your question?
